DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James P. Green, 415.621.1501 of The Law Offices of James P. Green appearing in person for Plaintiff Mary Ellen O'Connor, Successor Trustee of the Nora C. O'Connor 1991 Revocable Living Trust.
Ciaran O'Sullivan, 415.391.3711 of The Law Offices of Ciaran O'Sullivan appearing in person for Defendant Rose O. Abendroth.

Hearing held. Mr. Green requests a continuance pending the resolution of the Probate matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ROSE ABENDROTH, VINCENT O'CONNOR DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED. This action shall be stayed until the resolution of the probate matter. Plaintiff may file an amended complaint thereafter if necessary and proper at that time. Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-12-2022 Off Calendar
